prompt: A vertical social-media comparison poster on a black background with a subtle gray grid, designed like a clean tech review graphic. At the top are two large side-by-side headings: on the left, bright yellow text reading “GPT image 2”; on the right, white text reading “Nano Banana”. Below the headings are 2 tall poster mockups placed side by side with narrow spacing, each in an off-white paper style. The left mockup shows a traditional Chinese ink-wash fantasy poster inspired by Journey to the West, with large vertical Chinese calligraphy “西游记” near the upper left, muted sepia and gray watercolor mountains, cliffs, mist, temple architecture, and 4 tiny human figures visible in the composition: 2 heroic figures near the upper middle on a rocky ledge, plus 2 travelers lower in the scene; a swirling luminous mist vortex appears near the lower area. The right mockup shows a more graphic surreal poster built inside the side-profile silhouette of a human head facing left, filled with a Chinese fantasy landscape including pagodas, water, paths, figures, and the vertical title “西游记” inside the silhouette; the silhouette is painted in dark navy and black watercolor with cream paper around it. Each of the 2 posters has a large centered vertical rectangular blur censor block over the middle area, with soft edges and gray-beige color. Along the bottom is a rounded black caption panel with a thin white outline. Attached to its upper left corner is a bright yellow pill-shaped label containing the Chinese text “提示词” in bold black. Inside the bottom panel is a block of bold white Chinese text in multiple lines. The text should read: “西游记主题收藏版史诗海报，人物侧脸剪影中生长出完整世界观与经典场景。整体偏电影海报和梦幻水彩插画风，安静、宏大、神圣、怀旧，带纸张颗粒、轻雾感、飞白刷痕与高级留白。” The overall style is a polished Chinese tech comparison thumbnail, high contrast, editorial layout, centered composition, 4:5 portrait aspect ratio.
